phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Casa de Serralves entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Casa de Serralves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Casa de Serralves is a separate building down the garden path from the main museum.

likely_response.translation_en: Through the garden, follow the path.

responses.english: Through the garden, follow the path.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Casa de Serralves entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Casa de Serralves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museum staff prioritize spatial clarity and provide concise directions without unnecessary elaboration.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Casa de Serralves.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Casa de Serralves.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Casa de Serralves.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Casa de Serralves.

phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Jardim de Serralves?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim de Serralves.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Jardim de Serralves.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Jardim de Serralves.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Jardim de Serralves.

phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Jardim de Serralves?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim de Serralves a partir da entrada principal. Se precisar de mais ajuda, pergunte ao segurança do parque ou ao funcionário da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO PAH-ruh-kih OHW OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Jardim de Serralves from the main entrance. If you need further assistance, ask the park security or the ticket staff.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Jardim de Serralves from the main entrance. If you need further assistance, ask the park security or the ticket staff.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO PAH-ruh-kih OHW OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Jardim de Serralves a partir da entrada principal. Se precisar de mais ajuda, pergunte ao segurança do parque ou ao funcionário da bilheteira.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Casa de Serralves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Casa de Serralves.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Casa de Serralves.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Casa de Serralves.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DIH seh-RAHL-vihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Casa de Serralves.
